Configuration and documentation for building, debugging, and interacting with Pebble firmware and PRF.


## Files
- **[options.md](options.md.md)**: Configuration options for building and debugging the Pebble firmware.
- **[prf.md](prf.md.md)**: Documentation for building, flashing, and interacting with Pebble Recovery Firmware (PRF).
- **[qemu.md](qemu.md.md)**: Instructions for building, running, and debugging firmware with QEMU for STM32 targets.
